projects.title: 3D Lung Tumor Detection using Deep Learning and Generative AI
projects.description: Designed a 3D medical imaging pipeline for automated lung tumor detection from CT scans. Processed volumetric CT scan data into structured 3D segmented slices for supervised learning. Implemented Generative AI-based data augmentation to address class imbalance and improve model generalization. Trained convolutional deep learning models for tumor detection on augmented 3D medical imaging dataset. Evaluated model performance using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1-Score, and confusion matrix analysis.

projects.title: Multimodal DDoS Attack Detection using ML and Deep Learning
projects.description: Developed a hybrid Intrusion Detection System (IDS) for real-time DDoS attack classification. Processed CICIDS2017 and CICDDoS2019 datasets for binary and multi-class attack detection. Engineered statistical and temporal traffic features including flow duration, packet/byte rate, and TCP flag metrics. Designed multimodal architecture combining Random Forest and XGBoost with LSTM for enhanced pattern learning. Applied feature scaling, dimensionality reduction (PCA), and class imbalance handling (SMOTE) to improve generalization. Reduced False Positive Rate (FPR) via threshold optimization while maintaining high Recall and ROC-AUC.

projects.title: Automatic License Plate Recognition using YOLO and OCR
projects.description: Developed an end-to-end deep learning pipeline for real-time license plate detection and text extraction. Built a two-stage system using YOLO (Ultralytics) for license plate detection and PaddleOCR for text recognition. Implemented detection → plate cropping → OCR pipeline with preprocessing (grayscale conversion, image upscaling). Applied transfer learning, layer freezing, and fine-tuning to improve mAP and convergence speed. Trained on custom YOLO-format dataset in Google Colab with automated data.yaml configuration. Evaluated performance using mAP@50, Precision, and Recall; exported inference-ready model weights.

projects.title: Fuzzy Water Quality Checker
projects.description: Developed a fuzzy logic-based system to compute WQI from environmental parameters. Built using Python and Streamlit for interactive web UI. Designed fuzzy membership functions for pH, DO, BOD, Nitrate, and Temperature. Applied fuzzy inference rules to classify water into Poor, Moderate, and Good. Deployed app on Streamlit Cloud using GitHub integration.

Built a responsive React frontend with dynamic NFT rendering and wallet interaction.

current_role: Bachelor of Technology in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at National Institute of Technology, Kurukshetra, India

projects.title: Ethereum Phishing Scam Detection Using Hybrid Graph Neural Networks (DA-HGNN)
projects.description: Built a hybrid deep learning architecture combining Conv1D, GRU with Multi-Head Attention, and SAGEConv GNN, using Graph Autoencoder (GAE) with 11-dimensional node feature vectors to learn both temporal and structural node embeddings. Applied sliding window-based data augmentation to resolve class imbalance across 348K+ transaction records, balancing phishing vs. benign node samples for robust model training. Achieved 99.4% AUC-ROC, 99.5% Recall, and 99.4% F1-score on real-world Ethereum datasets, outperforming LSTM, GCN, GAT, and LightGBM baselines; validated through ablation studies and sensitivity analysis.

projects.title: The Donna Device
projects.description: Designed and developed a smart voice-enabled assistant using Raspberry Pi with speech recognition and synthesis for hands-free, personality-driven interaction. Implemented NLP-based command processing for contextual responses and integrated ESP32 for Wi-Fi connectivity to enable real-time information retrieval.

projects.title: ByteSized — Weekly Tech Digest Newsletter
projects.description: Designed and developed a web-based weekly tech newsletter delivering curated AI, startups, dev tools, and gadgets news — achieving 68% open rate and 5-minute read time. Built a responsive subscription landing page with email collection and archive system, amassing 15 subscribers with zero-spam policy and single-click unsubscribe.
